cards.title: Help Your Sensitive Teen Navigate Social Media Pressure
cards.body: Teens who feel different from their peers often struggle with self-worth, especially on social media. As their world expands with time, they'll find people who understand them and share their values.

cards.title: Support Your Teen's College Decision-Making Process
cards.body: Summer college tours are an important opportunity for teens to explore their future. Parents can best support by encouraging their child's autonomy while offering guidance.

cards.title: Help Twins Develop Their Own Unique Identities
cards.body: Twin relationships are close but can hinder individual identity development. Parents should encourage each twin to pursue their own interests and friendships.

cards.title: What Parents Should Know About Teen Trouble
cards.body: Recent legal cases show parents can face charges related to their child's actions. Being informed and prepared helps parents guide teens through critical situations.

cards.title: Music Education Builds Critical Life Skills in Children
cards.body: Music training develops executive function, self-control, and decision-making abilities. These skills learned through music lead to greater success throughout life.

cards.title: Energy Drinks Banned for Under-16s in England
cards.body: High-caffeine energy drinks will be illegal to sell to children under 16 from April next year. This protects young people from dangerous caffeine overexposure.

cards.title: Celebrate Children's Authors Addressing Teen Masculinity Crisis
cards.body: Patrice Lawrence, author of the bestselling YA novel Orangeboy, brings essential perspectives to children's literature. His work addresses the critical issue of teenage masculinity in modern society.
